description.ko: 어두운 진공 상태에서 깊은 베이스 주파수에 반응하는 액체 크롬의 물리적 파동으로 음파를 시각적으로 포착했습니다.
description.en: A visual capture of sound waves as physical ripples in liquid chrome, reacting to deep bass frequencies in a dark vacuum.

prompt: A cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Resonant Ripple.' A central liquid-chrome sphere suspended in a dark obsidian void, vibrating at a low frequency. The vibration generates concentric #4169E1 royal blue ripples that transform into sharp #32CD32 green geometric spikes at peak amplitude. Swirling #FFD700 gold light filaments wrap around the waves, while an underlying #FF4500 electric orange pulse illuminates the floor of the void. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, fluid motion blur on the vibrating edges, and complex cymatic patterns. 8k resolution, visualizing the physical impact of a bass drop in a vacuum.
